cases.prompt: 출시 한 달 됐는데 PMF 분석 좀 해줘. 활성 사용자 예측이랑 Sean Ellis 점수도.

assertions.text: Produces a 3-case projection (Optimistic / Base / Pessimistic) with active user ratio prediction
Simulates the Sean Ellis test with the 40% very-disappointed PMF threshold
Models a retention curve / cites D30 retention signal

cases.prompt: Project user activity for the next 6 months — give me optimistic/base/pessimistic cases.

assertions.text: Returns Optimistic, Base, and Pessimistic scenario projections of active users
References quantitative PMF signals such as viral coefficient K or DAU/MAU stickiness
